findings.title: Duplicated audit_event_ref validation
findings.summary: Claude noted validateHermesGateRequiredFields duplicates the same audit_event_ref validation used by validateHermesGateReferenceRelationships. Behavior is identical and consolidation is optional.

findings.title: may_reference allowed values are equal but separately sourced
findings.summary: Claude noted HERMES_GATE_REQUIRED_FIELD_REGISTRY may_reference.allowedValues points at HERMES_GATE_REFERENCE_RELATIONSHIP_TARGETS while runtime ownership validation checks HERMES_GATE_OWNERSHIP_POLICY.mayReference. Values are identical and contract validator cross-checks both, so this is non-blocking.

scope_reviewed: required gate_id, tenant_id, status, ownership metadata, and audit_event_ref
optional matter_id, blocked_claim_refs, and human_approval_refs deferred to RP00.P01.M03.S09
invalid and missing required field rejection
raw_result_excerpt: overall_verdict: PASS; No P0/P1/P2 findings; Blocks subphase closeout: NO; two P3_NOTE findings only.
